title: ethulia integrifolia
intro: Ethulia integrifolia, also known as the East African daisy or African bush daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Eastern Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Ethulia integrifolia has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Ethulia integrifolia include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
